tweets.text: Great to join Andrea Hazell in Scarborough-Guildwood as she runs for re-election as MPP! tweets.text: Mike Harris’s cuts to social services, housing, and healthcare pushed Ontario’s most vulnerable deeper into crisis. Pierre Poilievre is singing the same tune: tax cuts for the rich, austerity for the rest. We can’t afford another era of cruel, short-sighted policies. #cdnpoli
tweets.author: Michael Coteau

tweets.text: Pierre Poilievre’s playbook feels eerily familiar: tax cuts for the wealthy, slashing public services, and a ‘common sense’ branding. Looks like he’s channeling Mike Harris’s divisive and damaging legacy. We’ve seen this movie before, and we know how it ends. #cdnpoli
tweets.author: Michael Coteau
